title: glechoma viscida
intro: Glechoma viscida, also known as creeping thyme or creeping gypsywort, is a perennial herb native to Eastern Asia and the Russian Far East. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are due to the presence of compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Glechoma viscida include reducing inflammation and stress, improving cognitive function, and supporting the immune system. Glechoma viscida is traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
